prioritized_fixes.issue: ZERO significant results after multiple comparison correction
prioritized_fixes.action: Revise paper framing to honestly report null results. Either: (a) reframe as null-result paper with H5 (precision-recall asymmetry) as the main contribution, or (b) pre-register H1b as primary and conduct power analysis before claiming significance.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Title-abstract promise graph as predictive tool but graph predicts nothing
prioritized_fixes.action: Retitle paper to emphasize LCA-theoretical framework. Remove 'Local Inhibition Graph' from title. Revise abstract to lead with structural correspondence (G=W_dec^T W_dec), not graph predictions.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H1b p=0.028 is presented as significant without MCP context
prioritized_fixes.action: Add MCP context to every p-value citation. State clearly: 'p=0.028 uncorrected; Bonferroni-corrected p=0.334; BH-FDR q=0.107' wherever cited.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H6 falsification claimed as contribution despite 0% precision
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove 'First local inhibition graph for SAE diagnostics' from contributions. Either drop the graph or reframe as theoretical framework only.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Section 6.3 claims graph identifies at-risk features despite H8 r=+0.12, p=0.55
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove or heavily qualify the diagnostic claim. If the graph does not predict at-risk features, do not recommend it as a diagnostic.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Post-hoc power analysis (20% power) is methodologically questionable
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove post-hoc power analysis. Acknowledge insufficient power as a design limitation: 'n=26 features provides insufficient power for medium effects.'

prioritized_fixes.issue: OrtSAE ablation comparison at unmatched L0 (920 vs 550)
prioritized_fixes.action: Either match L0 values or acknowledge this confound invalidates the ablation conclusion.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Probe quality confound in CMI-absorption analysis (rho=-0.67 with probe F1)
prioritized_fixes.action: Compute partial correlation controlling for probe F1, or restrict CMI analysis to quality-gated letters (F1>0.85).

prioritized_fixes.issue: CMI-absorption correlation dimensionally unstable (sign reversal d'=10 to d'>=20)
prioritized_fixes.action: Acknowledge dimension instability. Do not cherry-pick d'=10 as primary. Report results across all dimensions or pre-register primary dimension.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H9 co-occurrence measurement is definitional tautology
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove H9 from paper or label it explicitly as a mathematical identity check.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Feature U (n=1) overgeneralized to conclude absorption is benign
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove generalization. Report Feature U as single case observation only.

prioritized_fixes.issue: MCC~0.21 across all variants including Random control
prioritized_fixes.action: Investigate whether Hungarian matching is valid at all before claiming any comparisons. If chance-level, the entire pipeline is suspect.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H8 claim (r=+0.12, p=0.55) lacks verifiable data source
prioritized_fixes.action: Provide data source or remove specific numbers.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Figure filename mismatch (fig7_precision_recall.pdf called Figure 2 in text)
prioritized_fixes.action: Rename figure files to match text references.

major_revisions_needed: Retitle paper to emphasize LCA-theoretical framework, not graph predictions
Revise abstract to honestly report H6 falsification and zero MCP-significant results
Add MCP context to all p-value citations
Remove graph as diagnostic contribution (it predicts nothing)
Control for probe quality in CMI-absorption analysis
Match L0 in OrtSAE ablation or acknowledge confound
structural_changes: Consider pivoting to metric validation study if graph-based predictions are abandoned entirely
If keeping LCA framework, restructure paper around theoretical contribution with H5 as empirical anchor
Add explicit power analysis section before claiming null results
